raw_consumer_statement: Despite my attempts to resolve inaccuracies on my credit report, American Express has not taken appropriate measures, raising major compliance concerns in relation to the FCRA/FDCPA. The handling of my disputes has been inadequate and violates the FCRA. Specific issues include Delayed Responses : My inquiries have gone unanswered for an unreasonable time, violating my right to prompt dispute resolution. Inadequate Investigation : The institutions investigations have been superficial, failing to address my specific concerns and failing to respond to the Illinois Attorney General. Non-Compliance with Consumer Protection Laws : The institutions lack of responsiveness and transparency raises serious compliance issues, concerning the FCRA and the FDCPA.
